case_title: SHUNTIAN JIANG VS. XPRESS DELIVERY SERVICE NV INC. ET AL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-18-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY JIANG, SHUNTIAN AS TO DEFENDANT XPRESS DELIVERY SERVICE NV INC. RAMIREZ, JONATHAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-03-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, AMENDING CLAIM TO CHANGE DEFENDANT'S NAME TO 'XPRESS DELIVERY SERVICE NV INC' AND TO DISMISS SECOND DEFENDANT, J. RAMIREZ FILED BY PLAINTIFF JIANG, SHUNTIAN
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (OFFICER AND AGENT FOR SERVICE);DISMISSAL AS TO JONATHAN RAMIREZ **ONLY** FILED BY PLAINTIFF JIANG, SHUNTIAN AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, JONATHAN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-18-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JIANG, SHUNTIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT XPRESS DELIVERY SERVICE NV INC. $9,423.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,528.00, AT HIS REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST JONATHAN RAMIREZ (OFFICER AND AGENT FOR SERVICE) IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-03-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-18-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF TO RE-SERVE DEFENDANTS PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:JONATHAN RAMIREZ) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JIANG, SHUNTIAN AS TO DEFENDANT XPRESS DELIVERY SERVICE NV INC.
